notes: Yield-bearing conditional-escrow (bounty #1) = stakeSlash 0x90E8 (+ vault 0x020d), arbiter/treasury = server wallet; the S3 lifecycle proof is on this contract. CCTP hookData stack (bounty #2 atomic cross-chain stake): cctpEscrowHook 0xf67d receives a CCTP V2 mint + calls stakeSlashHook.depositFor(builder); stakeSlashHook 0xA527 is StakeSlash + the additive depositFor (arbiter = the live Dynamic signer 0x159b), paired with yieldVaultHook 0xDaD5. Redeploy: forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:Deploy (escrow) or script/DeployCctpHook.s.sol:DeployCctpHook (hook stack) --rpc-url $ARC_RPC_URL --private-key $SERVER_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast (ARBITER=<wallet>).
